## Checklist

- [ ] No secrets or credentials committed
- [ ] New API routes have Swagger annotations updated (`make swagger`)
- [ ] New locale strings added to all supported language files (if applicable)
- [ ] PR title follows Conventional Commits format (`feat:`, `fix:`, `docs:`, etc.)
